meaning: 托布鲁克[利比亚东北部港市]
examples: In Tobruk, leading a patrol in no-man's land, he was blown up by a mortar bomb.
Terror and despair loom over Tobruk and Benghazi.
“The big problem is foreign bombing, not Qaddafi,” says Nasr Abu Bakr, a technician at a power plant in Tobruk.
Further afield, the Commonwealth War Graves Commission was holding services at its cemeteries in Libya in Tripoli, Benghazi and Tobruk.
Last week, the Interior Ministry closed the Imsaed border crossing with Egypt to any foreigners, officially to discourage illegal immigration, and began air patrols over the border out of Tobruk.
